# OpenMDAO file_utils oneshot

Wrap `openmdao.utils.file_utils.get_module_path` and resolve a real module path in this repo.

## Why This Case Exists

Utility modules are often the safest first foothold when wrapping a large engineering package, so this case acts like a minimal real-world starting example.

## Case Shape

- ID: `openmdao_file_utils`
- Tier: `gha_subset`
- Style: `package`
- Workflow Slice: `systems`
- Target Kind: `package`
- Upstream Target: `openmdao.utils.file_utils`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/openmdao_file_utils/challenge.toml`

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=openmdao_file_utils
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only openmdao_file_utils
```

## Fixtures

This case does not need checked-in fixtures.

## Smoke Flow

### 1. Resolve the installed path for the local mcpme package

Tool: `get_module_path`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "fpath": "{repo_root}/src/mcpme/__init__.py"
}
```

Expectations: text contains ['mcpme'].

## What This Case Proves

- Installed engineering utility modules can be scaffolded deterministically in one shot.
- Simple path-like parameters survive the generated wrapper path cleanly.
- The generated facade can execute a real upstream function without hand-written glue code.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: start with a stable utility function from a large engineering package.
# This is the cleanest "hello world" for one-shot package ingestion against OpenMDAO.
id = "openmdao_file_utils"
title = "OpenMDAO file_utils oneshot"
tier = "gha_subset"
style = "package"
slice = "systems"

[example]
summary = "Wrap `openmdao.utils.file_utils.get_module_path` and resolve a real module path in this repo."
motivation = "Utility modules are often the safest first foothold when wrapping a large engineering package, so this case acts like a minimal real-world starting example."
proves = [
  "Installed engineering utility modules can be scaffolded deterministically in one shot.",
  "Simple path-like parameters survive the generated wrapper path cleanly.",
  "The generated facade can execute a real upstream function without hand-written glue code.",
]

[target]
kind = "package"
value = "openmdao.utils.file_utils"

[probe]
imports = ["openmdao.utils.file_utils"]

[scaffold]
kind = "package"
symbol_include_patterns = ["^get_module_path$"]

[smoke]
[[smoke.steps]]
label = "Resolve the installed path for the local mcpme package"
tool = "get_module_path"
arguments = { fpath = "{repo_root}/src/mcpme/__init__.py" }

[smoke.steps.expect]
text_contains = ["mcpme"]
```
